stakeholders.name: Emily Chen
stakeholders.goals: Grow online revenue and increase customer lifetime value; holds budget authority

stakeholders.name: Marcus Webb
stakeholders.goals: Ensure platform stability, security compliance, and clean ERP/warehouse integrations

stakeholders.name: Sophie Adler
stakeholders.goals: Improve post-purchase CX, reduce churn, and champion tools that raise satisfaction scores

situation: The store converts first-time buyers well but has no post-purchase engagement — no loyalty mechanism, no personalized re-engagement, no structured upsell path. Repeat purchases happen by chance.
problem: Customers who bought once aren't coming back. Cart abandonment sits around 72%, emails are generic blasts, and there's no recommendation engine. Customer lifetime value is well below benchmark.
downsides: The store competes purely on price and ad spend. Rising acquisition costs erode margins while competitors with loyalty programmes capture the repeat business this store should own.
focus: A post-purchase engagement layer — automated emails, a loyalty programme, and personalized recommendations — to raise repeat purchase rate, lift average order value, and build a retained customer base.

steps.title: Browse & Discover
steps.walkthrough: A first-time visitor lands via paid social or organic search and browses category and product pages. The experience is clean but generic — no personalization and no dynamically surfaced social proof.
steps.exists: Standard product catalogue and site search.
steps.needed: Dynamic product recommendations, review highlights, and 'customers also viewed' carousels.

steps.title: Add to Cart & Checkout
steps.walkthrough: Customer adds items and proceeds to checkout. Guest checkout is available but there is no email capture for abandonment recovery and no upsell prompt at this stage.
steps.exists: Functional checkout flow with guest option.
steps.needed: Pre-checkout email capture, cart abandonment recovery trigger, and a 'frequently bought together' upsell module.

steps.title: Order Confirmation & First Post-Purchase Touch
steps.walkthrough: After purchase the customer receives a standard transactional confirmation email with no brand story, no loyalty invite, and no cross-sell.
steps.needed: Branded confirmation email with loyalty programme invite, live tracking link, and one contextually relevant product recommendation.

steps.title: Delivery & Unboxing
steps.walkthrough: Product arrives with no in-box material and no triggered post-delivery email to confirm satisfaction or prompt a review.
steps.needed: Post-delivery email on day +2 requesting a review, awarding loyalty points for completion, and surfacing a complementary product.

steps.title: Loyalty & Re-engagement
steps.walkthrough: Repeat purchase is left entirely to chance. There is no loyalty programme, no milestone communication, and no win-back sequence for lapsed customers.
steps.exists: n/a — nothing currently exists for post-purchase retention.
steps.needed: Loyalty points engine, automated re-engagement at 30/60/90 days, win-back offer for lapsed customers, and a points-expiry nudge email.
